issues.description: Effect array is empty but card has significant text describing a Counter effect that prevents K.O. and rests DON cards instead
Missing Counter trigger for 'If this Character would be K.O.'d'
Missing condition to verify opponent's effect is causing the K.O.
Missing Rest action targeting 2 active DON cards; missing implicit prevention of K.O.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Once Per Turn] If this Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may rest 2 of your active DON!! cards instead.
